body.title: Design reflexes — cooperative, external-state, homogeneous, observable; the corrections that keep recurring
body.statement: COOPERATIVE, NOT HIERARCHICAL: each component is responsible for ITSELF; there is no supervisor/coordinator/box-agent layer to add, ever — the resident primitives already exist (shims are up + Ground Loop is up; GL is passive: heartbeat + startup-error rescue only). New coordination = an existing primitive doing one more thing it's already shaped to do. EXTERNAL STATE: every device externalizes ALL runtime state so restart loses nothing — before adding an in-memory field ask 'what happens on restart?'. HOMOGENEITY OVER SPECIAL-CASE: one mechanism parameterized by addressee, never N near-identical per-device surfaces; a needed special case must justify itself. BUTTON PATTERN: shared counters/flags get a single atomic owner (UPDATE ... SET x=x+1 RETURNING x); callers press, never read-modify-write. SHAPE FIRST: when a new capability appears, ask 'what shape does this problem have?' and build the minimal lateral device — Igor is never the default home (Igor USES systems, does not contain them; export capability to the rack, don't extract). MIGRATIONS ARE TWO HALVES: copy-forward AND remove-behind, explicit in the plan — verify-merged, then delete, so exactly one home survives. VERIFY DIVERGENCE BEFORE COLLAPSING: an implementation difference may be an essential adaptation, not debt — find the discriminator before unifying (mocked tests pass a hollow collapse). OBSERVABILITY FIRST: visibility into structure is what enables diagnosis — prefer making state visible over adding capability; when live probing isn't converging, ADD LOGGING at the decision points instead of inferring from outside. EVERY POINT CARRIES ITS WHY (Theory of Operation): rules, nodes, skills, architecture — a point without a why gets 'simplified' away by the next reader. CREDENTIALS compose at CONNECT time, never into values that serialize/travel. DESIGN FOR CC'S MENTAL MODEL: named role-wrappers over parameterized abstractions when CC is the executor. CRAFTSMANSHIP: research project, no deadline — no shortcuts, one right solution over three quick ones; 'no rush' means thorough, not slow. WAIT FOR THE BETTER LEVER: known-but-deferred issues are held deliberately; when adjacent work surfaces one, capture it on its lever, don't scramble to fix. Skills single-source from repo skills/ via symlink — copy-sync is the drift disease.
body.why: These are the reflexes Akien has corrected repeatedly — the supervisor reflex was re-committed one message after being named (2026-07-03); five copies of the decision corpus accumulated because migrations only ever ran their copy-forward half; a near-collapse of the minion tool-protocol would have shipped green on mocked tests. Each clause names the failure it prevents so a fresh builder inherits the correction, not the mistake (the whole point of repo residency).
